_description: Cartographer - Auto-generate ecosystem + project map (harness carto scope) + track enrichments

SessionStart._description: Harness carto scope: project map (.cartographer/project) + plugin ecosystem map (.cartographer) + nav context. Ports generate_project_map.py + generate_map.py.

PostToolUse._description: Harness: save descriptions from an edited .cartographer index.md to .enriched.json (ports track-enrichment.py)
